_description: Mock holiday calendar for major eBay cross-border sites. Used by HolidayTool to explain seasonal metric swings.

holidays.name: New Year
holidays.note: Year-start clearance and gift-card redemption boost GMV

holidays.name: Valentine's Day
holidays.note: Jewelry, Fashion and gifting categories spike

holidays.name: Easter
holidays.note: Public holiday reduces active buyers in Germany; logistics slow down

holidays.name: Easter
holidays.note: Bank holiday weekend depresses weekday traffic

holidays.name: Golden Week
holidays.note: Extended holiday reduces domestic ordering and fulfillment

holidays.name: Prime Day (competitive)
holidays.note: Amazon Prime Day diverts buyer attention and spend away from eBay

holidays.name: Prime Day (competitive)
holidays.note: Amazon.de Prime Day pulls demand; eBay Electronics GMV typically dips

holidays.name: Summer Holiday
holidays.note: German summer vacation season lowers online purchasing intent

holidays.name: Black Friday
holidays.note: Largest annual GMV spike across all sites

holidays.name: Christmas
holidays.note: Order volume drops during the holiday itself; shipping paused
